title: Kill me command 自殺指令
description:
讓所有玩家不需要管理員權限，可以達成如/kill @s。
All players do not need administrator rights and can achieve /kill @s.
body:
Kill me command 自殺指令 ---- 有時候伺服器上的玩家卡在了出不去的地方，或者玩家可能想要快速地回到重生點，本來`/kill @s`僅供具有op玩家有權利使用，但現在一般玩家也能夠透過`/trigger kill.me`來達成。
Sometimes players on the server are stuck in a place where they cannot get out, or players may want to quickly return to the spawnpoint. Originally `/kill @s` was only available to players with OP, but now ordinary players can also use it through `/trigger kill.me` to achieve.
指令列表command list
指令command 功能function 使用use
/trigger kill.me 主要指令
main command		 所有玩家皆可使用
Available to all players
/trigger kill.confirm 確認指令
confirm command
/function kill.me:admin 管理員選單
admin console		 限op玩家使用
Only for op players
